body:
To help in debugging TempestRemap albedo regridding issue detailed in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/764. 

adds tests for:
- [x] remapping between spectral elements with different numbers of elements. All 4 cases of spacefillingcurve true -> true, true -> false, false -> true, false -> false
- [x] remapping from spectral element constructured with spacefillingcurve to lat/lon, and back 

### QA
- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: add CCTR spacefillingcurve tests
